response.justification: Candidate is a strong, versatile senior generalist with extensive web, backend, and polyglot experience, but the role is highly specialized in JVM internals, Kotlin, and Spring ecosystem tooling. Resume shows Java listed only as a peripheral skill with no Spring, Kotlin, or IDE/language-tooling experience. Primary depth is in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, which do not align with the core requirements. A weak match for this specific position.
strengths: Senior-level experience across complex, large-scale systems at Stripe, Shopify, and Dunnhumby
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, testing tooling, open-source contributions)
Some exposure to C/C++ IDE tooling (LabWindows/CVI at National Instruments) suggests interest in dev tools
concerns: No demonstrated Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience
Java mentioned only briefly; no Kotlin or deep JVM expertise evident
No experience with IDE internals or language tooling at the depth this role requires

key_factors.factor: Senior engineering and craftsmanship track record
